title: Simple Mobile Game

requirements.text: Create a simple tap/click-based mobile game where the player taps appearing targets on screen to score points. Targets should appear at random positions, shrink over time, and disappear if not tapped. Each successful tap increments the score. The game runs for 30 seconds, after which a game-over screen shows the final score and a restart button.
acceptanceCriteria: Targets (circles or similar shapes) appear at random positions on screen
Targets shrink and disappear if not tapped within ~2 seconds
Tapping a target increases the score by 1
A visible countdown timer starts at 30 seconds
When the timer reaches 0, a game-over screen displays the final score
A restart button resets the score, timer, and game state
Layout is optimized for mobile screen sizes (touch-friendly, portrait orientation)

requirements.text: Store and display the player's all-time high score on the backend. When a game ends, if the final score exceeds the stored high score, update it. Display the current high score on both the main game screen and the game-over screen.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend actor exposes a query to get the high score and an update to set a new high score
High score is persisted across page refreshes
High score is shown on the game HUD and on the game-over screen
High score updates automatically if the player beats it

requirements.text: Apply a vibrant arcade-style visual theme: bold neon colors on a dark background, large rounded touch targets, smooth CSS animations for target appearance and shrinking, and clear score/timer typography. The design must feel polished and playable on a mobile screen.
acceptanceCriteria: Dark background with neon accent colors used consistently throughout
Score and timer are prominently displayed and easy to read
Targets have smooth scale-down animations before disappearing
Tap feedback (e.g., burst or color flash) is visible on successful taps
UI looks clean and usable on screens 375px–430px wide

constraints: Game logic must run entirely on the frontend; backend is only used for high score persistence
Do not use WebSockets or real-time features
nonGoals: Multiplayer or leaderboard with multiple users
User authentication or Internet Identity login

required: Colorful neon starburst or radial glow splash screen background illustration with dark background and vivid magenta, cyan, and yellow light rays (game-bg.dim_390x844.png)
